mapper.select: SELECT * FROM stock_sec_financial_standard WHERE symbol = #{symbol} AND fiscal_period = 'FY' ORDER BY end_date DESC, CASE WHEN form IN ('10-K', '10-K/A', '20-F', '20-F/A', '40-F', '40-F/A') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, filed_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM stock_sec_financial_standard WHERE symbol = #{symbol} AND fiscal_period = 'FY' AND end_date < #{endDate} ORDER BY end_date DESC, CASE WHEN form IN ('10-K', '10-K/A', '20-F', '20-F/A', '40-F', '40-F/A') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, filed_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM stock_sec_financial_standard WHERE symbol = #{symbol} AND fiscal_period IN ('Q1', 'Q2', 'Q3', 'Q4') ORDER BY end_date DESC, CASE WHEN assets IS NOT NULL OR equity IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, filed_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM stock_sec_financial_standard WHERE symbol = #{symbol} AND fiscal_period IN ('Q1', 'Q2', 'Q3', 'Q4') AND end_date < #{endDate} ORDER BY end_date DESC, CASE WHEN assets IS NOT NULL OR equity IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, filed_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO stock_sec_financial_standard ( symbol, cik, fiscal_year, fiscal_period, form, filed_at, start_date, end_date, accession_number, period_days, currency, revenue, operating_income, net_income, eps_diluted, assets, liabilities, equity, operating_cash_flow, eps_unit, raw_json, mapped_at ) VALUES
( #{row.symbol}, #{row.cik}, #{row.fiscalYear}, #{row.fiscalPeriod}, #{row.form}, #{row.filedAt}, #{row.startDate}, #{row.endDate}, #{row.accessionNumber}, #{row.periodDays}, #{row.currency}, #{row.revenue}, #{row.operatingIncome}, #{row.netIncome}, #{row.epsDiluted}, #{row.assets}, #{row.liabilities}, #{row.equity}, #{row.operatingCashFlow}, #{row.epsUnit}, #{row.rawJson}, #{row.mappedAt} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE filed_at = VALUES(filed_at), start_date = VALUES(start_date), period_days = VALUES(period_days), currency = VALUES(currency), revenue = VALUES(revenue), operating_income = VALUES(operating_income), net_income = VALUES(net_income), eps_diluted = VALUES(eps_diluted), assets = VALUES(assets), liabilities = VALUES(liabilities), equity = VALUES(equity), operating_cash_flow = VALUES(operating_cash_flow), eps_unit = VALUES(eps_unit), raw_json = VALUES(raw_json), mapped_at = VALUES(mapped_at)
